trigger_phrases: od artifacts create not a design
derived.causal_summary: Phase 004 verified the spec-150 work live and by deep review. A live generation test proved that Open Design generation is a multi-turn discovery-form flow (od run start to a question-form to od ui respond to build) and that od artifacts create only adds a file, with a real design rendered via the corrected flow. A 10-seat deep review (5 claude2-opus judgment seats plus 5 gpt-5.5-fast mechanical seats, narrow slices, at-location round-2 verification) found one FAIL and nine PASS-WITH-FINDINGS; all P0/P1 and the P2 backlog were remediated and re-validated, with three by-convention items left WONTFIX. The shipped Apache-2.0-only license state was confirmed correct. The live findings drove the phase 007 generation-flow correction. Residual: an optional operator-gated formal od mcp install opencode live-wire. This is a retroactive record of already-completed work.
